# DRAFT Framework

DRAFT is the Deployable Reference Architecture Framework Toolkit. This
repository is the upstream framework for creating machine-readable,
deployable architecture catalogs in private company DRAFT repos. Company repos
vendor a reviewed framework copy under `.draft/framework/`.

## AI Bootstrap

- Canonical AI instructions: AGENTS.md
- Draftsman role: framework/docs/draftsman.md
- Draftsman AI guidance: framework/docs/draftsman-ai-configuration.md
- Framework index: AI_INDEX.md
- Schema reference: framework/docs/yaml-schema-reference.md
- Requirement Groups: framework/docs/requirement-groups.md
- Capabilities: framework/docs/capabilities.md
- Validation command: python3 framework/tools/validate.py

## Core Concepts

- Technology Component: a third-party product, operating system, platform,
  software, or agent object.
- Host: an operational platform that combines an operating system, compute
  platform, and required host capabilities.
- Runtime Service: reusable runtime behavior such as web, app, cache, worker,
  messaging, or serverless runtime.
- Data-at-Rest Service: durable data behavior such as database, file, object,
  search, analytics, or storage.
- Edge/Gateway Service: boundary behavior such as WAF, firewall, API gateway,
  load balancer, ingress, proxy, or traffic inspection.
- Delivery Model: self-managed, PaaS, SaaS, and appliance are delivery models
  for service objects, not separate object types.
- Reference Architecture: a reusable deployment pattern.
- Software Deployment Pattern: a product-specific intended deployment shape.
- Requirement Group: the unified interview, completeness, and control evidence
  model.
- Capability: an architecture capability that resolves to company-approved
  Technology Component implementations.
- Decision Record: a deployment risk or architecture decision.
- Drafting Session: resumable state for incomplete authoring work.
- Effective Model: vendored framework base configurations plus private company
  configurations plus private company catalog content.

## Important Paths

- README.md
- AGENTS.md
- AI_INDEX.md
- framework/docs/
- framework/schemas/
- framework/configurations/
- templates/
- examples/catalog/
- docs/index.html
- framework/tools/validate.py
- framework/tools/generate_browser.py
- framework/tools/generate_ai_index.py
